scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'), { execSync } = require('child_process'); if (fs.existsSync('frontend')) { execSync('cd frontend && npm run build', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { execSync('npm run build', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.vercel-build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'), { execSync } = require('child_process'); if (fs.existsSync('frontend')) { execSync('cd frontend && npm run build', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { execSync('npm run build', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
